warnings: Primary Remotion render was blocked: no local Chrome/Chromium and DNS could not resolve remotion.media. Used local bundled FFmpeg frame-render fallback to produce MP4.
Caption-led video has no audio track because no TTS provider was configured in the approved proposal.
verification_notes: Bundled ffmpeg probe reports valid MP4 container, H.264 video, 1280x720, 30 fps, duration 00:01:00.00.
Four review frames were sampled from opening, middle, climax, and ending.

issues: No audio track by design: caption-led fallback because no configured TTS provider was available in the approved proposal.

promise_preservation.runtime_swap_check: ok — Remotion execution was blocked by missing Chrome and DNS failure; fallback was logged as d-004 and used only to satisfy the user request to make the video without more approvals.

issues: Caption text is derived directly from the approved script; no audio transcript was generated.

issues_found: No audio track; this is a caption-led video because TTS was unavailable in the approved production plan.
Render engine fallback from Remotion execution to local FFmpeg frame encoding was required by environment limitations and logged in decision d-004.

decisions.subject: Video production pipeline

options_considered.label: Animated explainer
options_considered.reason: Best fit for turning a scientific paper into diagrams, captions, and concise narration.

options_considered.label: Cinematic trailer
options_considered.reason: Would need configured video generation and is less precise for pathway science.

options_considered.label: Avatar spokesperson
options_considered.reason: Would require avatar/TTS tooling that is unavailable.

decisions.reason: Paper announcement needs accuracy and pathway clarity more than cinematic footage.

decisions.subject: Render runtime

options_considered.label: Remotion
options_considered.reason: Available and strong for React-based scientific scene cards, captions, and diagrams.

options_considered.label: HyperFrames
options_considered.reason: Could be strong for kinetic typography but is unavailable in this environment.
options_considered.rejected_because: runtime not available on this machine

options_considered.label: FFmpeg-only
options_considered.reason: Useful for simple stitching but weaker for custom motion-graphics pathway animation.

decisions.reason: Recommended pending user approval because it is available and fits the data-explainer grammar.

decisions.subject: Recommended concept

options_considered.label: The Enzyme With Two Jobs
options_considered.reason: Most balanced and surprising for a quick paper announcement.

options_considered.label: A Liver Cell’s Stress Switch
options_considered.reason: Most accessible for general audiences but slightly less focused on novelty.

options_considered.label: Why Blocking Isn’t Deleting
options_considered.reason: Best translational angle but narrower audience.

decisions.reason: Recommended pending user approval for widest high-quality impact.

decisions.subject: Render execution after Remotion browser download failed

options_considered.label: Remotion render
options_considered.reason: Approved runtime, but blocked because no local Chrome/Chromium exists and DNS could not resolve remotion.media to download headless Chrome.

options_considered.label: Local FFmpeg frame render
options_considered.reason: Available through bundled Remotion compositor FFmpeg and can produce the requested video without paid providers or more approval steps.

decisions.reason: User explicitly requested making the video without additional human-in-loop steps; local encoder fallback produced the deliverable when Remotion could not start.

findings.title: Remotion execution fallback
findings.description: Remotion could not download Chrome due DNS and no local Chromium was installed; local FFmpeg frame encoding produced final MP4.

findings.title: No audio track
findings.description: No configured TTS provider; produced caption-led video.
